! Title: TemizWeb Ultimate
! Description: Türkçe odaklı, gizlilik dostu NSFW ve dikkat dağıtıcı yüzey filtresi
! Homepage: https://erdemyasar-web.github.io/TemizWeb/
! License: GPL-3.0-or-later
! Version: 1.0.0
! Expires: 12 hours
!
! SafeSearch veya YouTube Restricted Mode zorlanmaz.
! Telemetri yoktur; filtreleme cihaz üzerinde uBlock Origin tarafından yapılır.

! YouTube — amaçlı kullanım korunur; Home, Shorts ve öneriler kaldırılır
www.youtube.com##ytd-browse[page-subtype="home"] ytd-rich-grid-renderer
youtube.com##ytd-browse[page-subtype="home"] ytd-rich-grid-renderer
m.youtube.com##ytm-browse[page-subtype="home"] ytm-rich-grid-renderer
m.youtube.com##ytm-browse[tab-identifier="FEwhat_to_watch"] ytm-rich-grid-renderer
m.youtube.com##ytm-browse[browse-id="FEwhat_to_watch"] ytm-rich-grid-renderer

youtube.com##ytd-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts"])
youtube.com##ytd-mini-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts"])
youtube.com##ytd-rich-section-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts"])
youtube.com##ytd-reel-shelf-renderer
youtube.com##ytd-rich-item-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts/"])
youtube.com##ytd-video-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts/"])
m.youtube.com##ytm-pivot-bar-item-renderer:has(a[href*="/shorts"])
m.youtube.com##ytm-pivot-bar-item-renderer:has-text(/^Shorts$/i)
m.youtube.com##ytm-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href*="/shorts"])
m.youtube.com##ytm-reel-shelf-renderer
m.youtube.com##ytm-shorts-lockup-view-model
m.youtube.com##ytm-video-with-context-renderer:has(a[href*="/shorts/"])
m.youtube.com##ytm-rich-item-renderer:has(a[href*="/shorts/"])

youtube.com##ytd-watch-next-secondary-results-renderer
m.youtube.com##ytm-item-section-renderer:has(ytm-compact-video-renderer)
youtube.com##.ytp-endscreen-content
m.youtube.com##.ytp-endscreen-content

! =============================================================================
! TemizWeb — INTENTIONAL SOCIAL MEDIA MODE
! GENERATED FILE — edit scripts/generate_social.py instead.
! Preserves search, profiles, messages, direct content, composing, uploads
! and publishing. Removes passive feeds and algorithmic discovery.
! =============================================================================

! Rule 1: Allow desktop Shorts rich cards
youtube.com#@#ytd-rich-item-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts/"])

! Rule 2: Allow desktop Shorts search results
youtube.com#@#ytd-video-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts/"])

! Rule 3: Allow desktop Shorts channel items
youtube.com#@#ytd-reel-item-renderer

! Rule 4: Allow mobile Shorts rich cards
m.youtube.com#@#ytm-rich-item-renderer:has(a[href*="/shorts/"])

! Rule 5: Allow mobile Shorts search results
m.youtube.com#@#ytm-video-with-context-renderer:has(a[href*="/shorts/"])

! Rule 6: Allow mobile Shorts channel items
m.youtube.com#@#ytm-reel-item-renderer

! Rule 7: Allow desktop Shorts shelves outside homepage
youtube.com#@#ytd-rich-section-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts/"])

! Rule 8: Allow mobile Shorts lockups outside homepage
m.youtube.com#@#ytm-shorts-lockup-view-model

! Rule 9: Restore YouTube Subscriptions navigation
youtube.com#@#ytd-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href^="/feed/subscriptions"]),ytd-mini-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href^="/feed/subscriptions"])

! Rule 10: Restore mobile YouTube Subscriptions navigation
m.youtube.com#@#ytm-pivot-bar-item-renderer:has(a[href*="/feed/subscriptions"]),ytm-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href*="/feed/subscriptions"])

! Rule 11: Restore Instagram Explore/Search link exact
instagram.com#@#a[href="/explore/"]

! Rule 12: Restore Instagram Explore/Search link prefix
instagram.com#@#a[href^="/explore/"]

! Rule 13: YouTube desktop home page-subtype feed

! Rule 14: YouTube desktop root homepage rich grid
youtube.com#?#ytd-rich-grid-renderer:matches-path(/^[/](?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 15: YouTube desktop root homepage browse results
youtube.com#?#ytd-two-column-browse-results-renderer:matches-path(/^[/](?:[?].*)?$/) ytd-rich-grid-renderer

! Rule 16: YouTube desktop homepage Shorts shelves
youtube.com#?#ytd-rich-section-renderer:matches-path(/^[/](?:[?].*)?$/):has(a[href^="/shorts/"])

! Rule 17: YouTube desktop homepage reel shelves
youtube.com#?#ytd-reel-shelf-renderer:matches-path(/^[/](?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 18: YouTube desktop what-to-watch feed
youtube.com##ytd-browse[browse-id="FEwhat_to_watch"] ytd-rich-grid-renderer

! Rule 19: YouTube desktop Shorts guide navigation
youtube.com#?#ytd-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts"]),ytd-mini-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts"])

! Rule 20: YouTube desktop Shorts titled navigation
youtube.com#?#ytd-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[title="Shorts"]),ytd-mini-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[title="Shorts"]),ytd-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[aria-label="Shorts"]),ytd-mini-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[aria-label="Shorts"])

! Rule 21: YouTube desktop watch-next recommendations

! Rule 22: YouTube desktop endscreen recommendations

! Rule 23: Instagram root homepage post articles
instagram.com#?#main:matches-path(/^[/](?:[?].*)?$/) article

! Rule 24: Instagram root homepage feed sections
instagram.com#?#main:matches-path(/^[/](?:[?].*)?$/) section:has(article)

! Rule 25: Instagram suggested section
instagram.com#?#main section:has-text(/(?:Suggested for you|Suggestions for you|For you|Önerilenler|Senin için(?: önerilenler)?)/i)

! Rule 26: Instagram suggested parent container
instagram.com#?#main div:has(> div span:has-text(/^(?:Suggested for you|Suggestions for you|For you|Önerilenler|Senin için(?: önerilenler)?)$/i)):upward(2)

! Rule 27: Instagram Explore post tiles
instagram.com#?#main a[href^="/p/"]:matches-path(/^[/]explore(?:[/].*)?(?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 28: Instagram Explore reel tiles
instagram.com#?#main a[href^="/reel/"]:matches-path(/^[/]explore(?:[/].*)?(?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 29: Instagram Explore recommendation images
instagram.com#?#main a[href^="/explore/"] img:matches-path(/^[/]explore(?:[/].*)?(?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 30: Instagram Explore loading indicators
instagram.com#?#main [role="progressbar"]:matches-path(/^[/]explore(?:[/].*)?(?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 31: Instagram root loading indicators
instagram.com#?#main [role="progressbar"]:matches-path(/^[/](?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 32: Instagram Reels navigation
instagram.com##a[href="/reels/"]

! Rule 33: Instagram Reels endless feed
instagram.com##main:matches-path(/^[/]reels[/]?(?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 34: X Home navigation button
x.com##a[data-testid="AppTabBar_Home_Link"]

! Rule 35: Twitter Home navigation button
twitter.com##a[data-testid="AppTabBar_Home_Link"]

! Rule 36: X Home primary column
x.com##div[data-testid="primaryColumn"]:matches-path(/^[/]home(?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 37: Twitter Home primary column
twitter.com##div[data-testid="primaryColumn"]:matches-path(/^[/]home(?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 38: X Home fallback main region
x.com##main[role="main"]:matches-path(/^[/]home(?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 39: Twitter Home fallback main region
twitter.com##main[role="main"]:matches-path(/^[/]home(?:[?].*)?$/)

! Rule 40: X Explore discovery content
x.com##main section:matches-path(/^[/]explore(?:[/].*)?(?:[?].*)?$/):not(:has([data-testid="SearchBox_Search_Input"]))

! Rule 41: Twitter Explore discovery content
twitter.com##main section:matches-path(/^[/]explore(?:[/].*)?(?:[?].*)?$/):not(:has([data-testid="SearchBox_Search_Input"]))

! Rule 42: X trends sidebar
x.com##aside:has-text(/(?:What’s happening|What's happening|Trends for you|Gündemdekiler|İlgini çekebilecek gündemler)/i)

! Rule 43: Twitter trends sidebar
twitter.com##aside:has-text(/(?:What’s happening|What's happening|Trends for you|Gündemdekiler|İlgini çekebilecek gündemler)/i)

! Rule 44: X who-to-follow sidebar
x.com##aside:has-text(/(?:Who to follow|Kimi takip etmeli)/i)

! Rule 45: Twitter who-to-follow sidebar
twitter.com##aside:has-text(/(?:Who to follow|Kimi takip etmeli)/i)
